title_en: Quiz: Will AI Destroy Your Career?
title_zh: 测验：人工智能会毁掉你的职业吗？
rubric_en: Some jobs may be toast. Some will survive. Click your answers to learn your fate.
rubric_zh: 有些岗位可能难逃厄运，也有些会继续生存。点击你的答案，看看你的命运如何。

paragraphs.en: This spring, a team of top academic and think tank researchers tried to forecast AI’s effects on the economy between now and 2030. They surveyed dozens of economists, AI experts, and “superforecasters” about various scenarios, including one in which AI becomes so advanced that it can both write a “Pulitzer-caliber” book and negotiate its own publishing rights.
paragraphs.zh: 今年春天，一支顶尖学术界和智库研究人员的团队试图预测人工智能在当下到2030年间对经济的影响。他们对数十位经济学家、AI专家和“超级预言家”进行了调查，讨论了多种情景，包括一种情景：AI发展到足够先进，能够同时写出“普利策奖级（Pulitzer-caliber）”的书，并自行谈判出版权。

paragraphs.en: In the survey, most experts said that higher-ranking occupations—CEO, administrative manager, senior official, legislator—would continue to grow, even under the “rapid” AI scenario. For most other people working a white-collar job, the forecast was murky.
paragraphs.zh: 在这项调查中，大多数专家表示，即使在“快速”AI发展情景下，职位层级更高的职业——如首席执行官、行政经理、高级官员、立法者——仍将继续增长。对于大多数从事白领工作的其他人来说，预测则相当模糊。

paragraphs.en: Researchers are in broad agreement that AI is doing something to the economy and that whatever it’s doing is very complex. Real numbers are hard to come by. That’s why WIRED has developed this thoroughly unscientific quiz, based on factors that researchers say might help determine who’s at risk.
paragraphs.zh: 研究人员普遍认同人工智能正在对经济产生影响，而且这种影响非常复杂。要得到真实、准确的数字非常困难。这也是为何WIRED推出了这个完全不严谨的测验，依据的是研究人员认为可能影响就业风险的因素。

paragraphs.en: Is your job being affected by AI in ways this quiz didn’t capture? Contact Maddy securely on Signal at mvarner.01 or let us know in the comments below. Alternatively, you can submit a letter to the editor at [email protected].
paragraphs.zh: 你的工作是否正以这种测验未涵盖的方式受到AI影响？请通过 Signal 安全联系Maddy，账号是 mvarner.01，或在下方评论区告诉我们。你也可以向编辑部写信至 [email protected]。
